scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@leadpilot/shared && npm run build --workspace=@leadpilot/backend && npm run build --workspace=@leadpilot/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=@leadpilot/frontend && npm run lint --workspace=@leadpilot/backend
scripts.motion:render: cd motion-video && npm install && npm run render
scripts.motion:studio: cd motion-video && npm install && npm run studio
scripts.canvas-ad:export: cd canvas-ad && npm install && node export-video.mjs
